summary: Iteration 51 - Tested 3 features: (1) Dashboard KPIs auto-recalculate from transactions - March 2026 correctly shows 4762 CHF revenue and 2592 CHF profit; (2) Clickable transaction member links - Lucas Sanchez link in Details tab navigates to /members?search=Lucas%20Sanchez; (3) Renewal cycle selector in edit form - All 5 options (Mensuel/Trimestriel/Semestriel/Annuel/Personnalisé) present, auto-recalculates expiration date when changed, and manual date change sets cycle to Personnalisé. 9/9 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified.

integration_issues.issue: When navigating from transaction link with ?search=Lucas%20Sanchez, member not found in 'all' view because Lucas Sanchez has exit_date in the past. The 'all' view excludes departed members, so users must click 'Partis' tab to see them.
integration_issues.note: This is expected behavior per current code - 'all' view uses 'current' which excludes departed. Consider: either include departed in 'all' view when search param present, or change urlSearch default view to search across all including departed.

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard auto-recalculate KPIs works correctly via useEffect at Dashboard.js line 84-87
KPIDetailedView.js correctly passes onClickMember to CategoryBreakdown and navigates to /members?search=<name>
MembersPage.js renewal cycle selector at line 893-928 correctly recalculates subscription_end_date
Backend kpis.py line 141 includes client_name in transaction breakdown
Backend recalculate endpoint at line 184 correctly sums transactions by category
renewal_cycle is frontend-only state, not persisted to backend - this is intentional UI helper
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 verified 3 features: (1) KPI auto-recalculate - Dashboard.js line 84-87 triggers POST /api/monthly-kpis/{month}/recalculate on selectedMonth change. March 2026 KPIs: total_revenue=4762, net_profit=2592. (2) Clickable member links - KPIDetailedView.js CategoryBreakdown shows client_name with ExternalLink icon. Clicking navigates to /members?search=<name>. Lucas Sanchez is in 'Partis' category (exit_date=2026-02-28). (3) Renewal cycle selector - MembersPage.js edit form has CYCLE DE RENOUVELLEMENT with 5 options (Mensuel/Trimestriel/Semestriel/Annuel/Personnalisé). Changing cycle auto-recalculates expiration date. Manual date change sets cycle to Personnalisé. renewal_cycle is UI-only, not persisted to backend.

kpi_auto_recalculate.details: Dashboard auto-recalculates KPIs on load. March 2026: total_revenue=4762 CHF, net_profit=2592 CHF

kpi_recalculate_endpoint.details: POST /api/monthly-kpis/2026-03/recalculate returns correct values from transactions

transaction_client_name.details: GET /api/monthly-kpis/{month}/details includes client_name in transactions (e.g., Lucas Sanchez)

clickable_member_link.details: Clicking client name link navigates to /members?search=<name>

members_search_prefilled.details: Search input pre-filled from URL param when arriving at /members?search=Lucas%20Sanchez

renewal_cycle_selector.details: Edit modal shows CYCLE DE RENOUVELLEMENT dropdown with 5 options

renewal_cycle_options.details: Options: Mensuel (1 mois), Trimestriel (3 mois), Semestriel (6 mois), Annuel (12 mois), Personnalisé

renewal_cycle_auto_calculate.details: Changing cycle from Personnalisé to Annuel recalculates expiration date automatically

manual_date_sets_custom.details: Manually editing expiration date sets renewal cycle to Personnalisé
